title: Constructivist Classic Car Editorial Grid AI
sourceTitle: Constructivist Classic Car Editorial Grid AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: four fictional classic cars rendered as sleek constructivist editorial posters. Scene / Context: 2x2 grid, harsh geometric angles, muted chic colors, micro-text columns and page numbers. Source Recipe Translation: constructivist classic-car editorial grid. Preserve these source mechanics: 2x2 editorial constructivist poster grid, contemporary fashion campaign polish plus Soviet geometric dominance. Concrete social variant uses four fictional classic cars rendered as sleek constructivist editorial posters in 2x2 grid, harsh geometric angles, muted chic colors, micro-text columns and page numbers. Composition: vertical 4:5 social board with a clean 2x2 grid, large margins, and each quadrant readable as a thumbnail; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: 2x2 editorial constructivist poster grid, contemporary fashion campaign polish plus Soviet geometric dominance; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: VOL 01 / ROAD ICONS; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictional or generic subjects only, publication-safe, no real logo or unauthorized likeness; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
